instruction: Open the 035 download-log capture row before editing any download-log evidence fields.
instruction_zh: 先打开 035 下载日志 capture row，再编辑任何下载日志证据字段。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Open the cited download-log row and verify source_id before copying evidence.
instruction_zh: 打开被引用的下载日志行，并在复制证据前核对 source_id。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Copy download_id and URL only from the download log; leave evidence blank if no matching row is found.
instruction_zh: download_id 和 URL 只能从下载日志复制；未找到匹配行时保持证据字段空白。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record download status and HTTP status only from the download log, not from memory or route labels.
instruction_zh: 下载状态和 HTTP 状态只能从下载日志记录，不得凭记忆或 route 标签填写。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record file size only from the download log and keep size_review_status not_started until reviewed.
instruction_zh: 文件大小只能从下载日志记录，并在复核前保持 size_review_status 为 not_started。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record checksum only from the download log and keep checksum_review_status not_started until reviewed.
instruction_zh: checksum 只能从下载日志记录，并在复核前保持 checksum_review_status 为 not_started。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Verify local temp path and risk note from the download log; temporary files must stay in ignored directories.
instruction_zh: 从下载日志核对本地临时路径和风险说明；临时文件必须留在已忽略目录。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Do not infer rights status from download success, HTTP status, file size, checksum, or local file presence.
instruction_zh: 不得从下载成功、HTTP 状态、文件大小、checksum 或本地文件存在推断权利状态。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Do not promote the source, staging row, graph edge, component relation, or evolution relation from this checklist.
instruction_zh: 不得从本 checklist 提升来源、staging row、图谱边、构件关系或演化关系。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Do not write a decipherment claim or AI hypothesis as scholarship from this checklist.
instruction_zh: 不得从本 checklist 写入释读声明，也不得把 AI 假说写成学术结论。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain collected evidence, a checksum review, a size review, an access review, a rights decision, source promotion, component or evolution-chain assignment, or decipherment conclusion.
